records.ety: [D. woelen, bewoelen; akin to G. wuhlen, bewuhlen. √146.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Woolded; p. pr. & vb. n. Woolding.]

defs: To wind, or wrap; especially, to wind a rope round, as a mast or yard made of two or more pieces, at the place where it has been fished or scarfed, in order to strengthen it.
